meaning: n.浅滩,湍流,涟漪,洗牌动作vt.使起涟漪,迅速洗牌vi.流过浅滩,成涟漪.迅速翻书
examples: Also, the use of Angle steel riffle strengthened the efficiency of ore dressing.
Sample shall be mixed 3 times through riffle, and then put into the feeding container.
Also learn many ways to stack a deck including over hand, riffle and table faro shuffles.
He knows every pool and riffle like the furniture of his own living room.
The 36-year-old housewife goes there regularly to riffle through the dog-eared sheets that are pinned on the notice board.
